# YEGO CONTROL TOWER — SYSTEM MAP

**Version:** 1.0.0
**Date:** 2026-06-13
**Status:** FIRST DRAFT — Evidence-based from live repo audit
**Generated by:** Canonical Documentation Protocol — Task 5

---

## 1. SYSTEM OVERVIEW

YEGO CONTROL TOWER is an operational intelligence platform for ride-hailing fleet monitoring. It is organized into **9 canonical engines** in a mandatory architectural order.

```
CONTROL → DIAGNOSTIC → REACHABILITY → FORECAST → SUGGESTION → DECISION → ACTION → AI COPILOT → LEARNING
```

**Current active engine:** Control Foundation (REOPENED / P0 — OMNI-P0 Recovery)
**Next engine:** Diagnostic Engine (PAUSED, waiting for Control Foundation real GO)

---

## 2. DOMAIN MAP

### 2.1 Control Foundation (Engine #1 — ACTIVE)

| Subdomain | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| Omniview Matrix (Business Slice) | Real operational data by business slice × grain (daily/weekly/monthly) | ACTIVE |
| Plan vs Real | Plan vs Real monthly comparison | ACTIVE |
| Real LOB | Line-of-Business operational KPIs (hourly-first chain) | ACTIVE |
| Data Freshness | Pipeline freshness monitoring, staleness alerts | ACTIVE |
| Data Trust | Trust layer: OK/WARNING/BLOCKED signals | ACTIVE |
| Serving Governance | Serving fact registry, guardrails, runtime protection | ACTIVE |
| Period Governance | Period closure, snapshot management, locked periods | ACTIVE |
| Driver Lifecycle | Driver lifecycle cohorts, retention, weekly/monthly stats | ACTIVE |
| Supply Views | Driver supply metrics (some MVs stale — see CONSTRAINTS) | ACTIVE |
| Ownership Serving | Plan + Real + Ownership serving facts | ACTIVE |
| Financials | Real financials monthly | ACTIVE |
| Confidence Engine | Data confidence scores | ACTIVE |
| Omniview V2 | Source-agnostic matrix (parallel to V1), Plan Real side-by-side | ACTIVE (parallel) |
| KPI Consistency | Cross-grain KPI validation | ACTIVE |
| Observability | Artifact registry, refresh logs | ACTIVE |

### 2.2 Lima Growth / Growth Machine

| Subdomain | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| Driver Identity & Activity | Driver 360 profile, driver history daily/weekly | ACTIVE |
| State Snapshots | Daily driver state classification (LOYAL, ACTIVE, DECLINING, CHURN_RISK, CHURNED) | ACTIVE |
| Programs & Eligibility | Program eligibility rules (LOYALTY_14_90, ACTIVE_GROWTH, CHURN_PREVENTION) | ACTIVE |
| Opportunity Lists | Daily actionable driver lists from program eligibility | ACTIVE |
| Operational Queue | Queue management, control panel, queue modes | ACTIVE |
| Control Loop | Action tracking, agent management, daily impact measurement | ACTIVE |
| Segment Migration | Driver movement between segments, transition tracking | ACTIVE |
| Impact Attribution | Action-to-outcome attribution (agent, campaign, segment, channel) | ACTIVE |
| Export Pipeline | Loopcontrol export and result sync | ACTIVE |
| Freshness Chain | Pipeline health, daily refresh governance | ACTIVE |
| Scheduler | Daily refresh orchestration | ACTIVE |
| RNA Pilot | Recency-activity measurement pilot | ACTIVE |
| Executive Metrics | Executive dashboard metrics | ACTIVE |
| Universe Governance | Driver universe definitions and tracking | ACTIVE |
| UX/UI | Lima Growth V2 dashboard, UI1A (legacy) | ACTIVE |

### 2.3 Control Loop (Plan Data Domain)

| Subdomain | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| Plan Upload | Plan version ingestion (simple, ruta27, control_loop) | ACTIVE |
| Plan Versioning | Version management, metadata | ACTIVE |
| Control Loop PvR | Plan vs Real by business slice | ACTIVE |
| Business Slice Resolution | Normalization plan→slice mapping | ACTIVE |
| Projection Expected Progress | Plan vs Real projection mode (YTD, gaps, attainment) | ACTIVE |
| Seasonality Curves | Hierarchical fallback seasonality engine | ACTIVE |

### 2.4 Yango API / External Integrations

| Subdomain | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| Yango Loyalty | Oro Tracker, KPI monitoring, reachability | ACTIVE |
| Yango Loyalty Performance | Historical performance, city comparison | ACTIVE |
| Yango Loyalty Definition | Source definitions, validation packs | ACTIVE |
| Yango Raw Ingestion | Raw data ingestion from Yango Fleet API | ACTIVE |
| Yango Shadow Reconciliation | Shadow data comparison (CT vs Yango) | ACTIVE |
| Yango Driver Identity Audit | Driver identity reconciliation | ACTIVE |
| Yego Pro Profitability | Profit sharing, bonus config, simulation | ACTIVE |

### 2.5 Diagnostic Engine (Engine #2 — PAUSED)

| Subdomain | Description | Status |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| Behavioral Alerts | Driver behavior deviation alerts | ACTIVE (prototype) |
| Behavioral Pattern Diagnosis | Pattern-level diagnosis | PROTOTYPE |
| Driver Behavior Benchmarking | Driver performance benchmarking | PROTOTYPE |
| Operational Behavioral Intelligence | Behavioral KPIs and insights | PROTOTYPE |
| Fleet Leakage | Driver leakage detection | PROTOTYPE |
| Driver Lifecycle Diagnostic | Diagnostic cohorts and funnel | PROTOTYPE |

### 2.6 Backlog Engines (NOT ACTIVE)

| Engine | Status | Key Artifacts |
|--------|--------|---------------|
| Reachability Engine (#3) | BACKLOG | No implementation |
| Forecast Engine (#4) | BACKLOG | `projection_integrity_service.py`, `seasonality_curve_engine.py` (pilot) |
| Suggestion Engine (#5) | BACKLOG | `projection_suggestion_engine_service.py`, `projection_contextual_suggestion_service.py` (prototype) |
| Decision Engine (#6) | BACKLOG | `decision_engine.py` (data trust governance only) |
| Action Engine (#7) | BACKLOG | `action_engine_service.py`, `action_orchestrator_service.py` (prototype) |
| AI Copilot (#8) | BACKLOG | No implementation |
| Learning Engine (#9) | BACKLOG | `action_learning_service.py` (prototype) |

---

## 3. TECHNOLOGY STACK

| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Frontend | React 18 + Vite 5 + TailwindCSS 3 + ECharts 6 |
| Backend | FastAPI (Python 3) + Uvicorn |
| Database | PostgreSQL |
| ORM/Migrations | Alembic |
| Scheduler | APScheduler |
| Deploy | Nginx + systemd |
| Testing | Playwright (frontend), pytest (backend) |

---

## 4. DIRECTORY STRUCTURE (KEY PATHS)

```
controltower/
├── backend/
│   ├── app/
│   │   ├── main.py                    # FastAPI entry point
│   │   ├── routers/                   # 87 router files (API endpoints)
│   │   │   ├── ops.py                 # Main ops router (4393 lines)
│   │   │   ├── plan.py                # Plan management
│   │   │   ├── omniview_v2.py         # Omniview V2
│   │   │   ├── yego_lima_*.py         # ~50 Lima Growth routers
│   │   │   ├── yango_loyalty*.py      # Yango Loyalty
│   │   │   ├── phase2*.py             # Legacy phase routers
│   │   │   └── ...
│   │   ├── services/                  # 217 service files
│   │   ├── models/                    # Pydantic models
│   │   ├── repositories/              # DB query layer
│   │   ├── guardrails/                # Serving guardrails
│   │   ├── contracts/                 # API contracts
│   │   ├── adapters/                  # External adapters
│   │   └── db/                        # DB connection management
│   ├── sql/                           # 28 SQL build/deployment scripts
│   ├── scripts/                       # ~100+ operational scripts
│   ├── alembic/                       # DB migrations
│   └── migrations/                    # SQL migrations
├── frontend/
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/                # 71 React components
│   │   ├── pages/
│   │   │   ├── lima-growth-v2/        # Growth Machine v2 UI
│   │   │   ├── lima-growth-ui1a/      # Growth Machine legacy UI
│   │   │   ├── omniview-v2-shadow/    # Omniview V2 shadow
│   │   │   └── ...
│   │   ├── services/api.js            # API client (single file)
│   │   ├── config/                    # Navigation registry, constants
│   │   └── context/                   # React contexts
│   └── vite.config.js                 # Vite config (proxy /api → :8000)
├── docs/
│   ├── architecture/                  # 13 architecture docs
│   ├── control_foundation/            # 41 control foundation docs
│   ├── lima_growth/                   # 100+ lima growth docs
│   ├── omnibuilder_v2/               # 100+ omniview v2 docs
│   └── backlog/                       # 20 backlog items
├── OMNIVIEW_CANONICAL_REGISTRY.md     # Authoritative registry (868 lines)
├── ai_operating_system.md             # AI governance rules
├── ai_current_phase.md                # Current active phase
└── README.md
```

---

## 5. CANONICAL DATA FLOW

```
RAW TABLES (public.trips_2026, public.trips_2025)
    │
    ▼
ENRICHED VIEWS (ops.v_real_trips_enriched_base)
    │
    ▼
FACT TABLES (ops.real_business_slice_{day,week,month}_fact)
    │
    ├──► SERVING VIEWS (ops.v_real_business_slice_month_serving)
    │         │
    │         ▼
    └──► SERVICES (business_slice_service.py, business_slice_omniview_service.py)
              │
              ▼
         API ENDPOINTS (/ops/business-slice/*, /ops/real-lob/*)
              │
              ▼
         FRONTEND (BusinessSliceOmniview.jsx, RealLOBView.jsx, ...)
```

### Growth Machine Data Flow

```
YANGO FLEET API (external)
    │
    ▼
RAW INGESTION (yango_raw_ingestion_service.py)
    │
    ▼
DRIVER360 TABLES (growth.yango_lima_driver_360_daily, growth.yango_lima_driver_history_daily)
    │
    ▼
STATE SNAPSHOTS (growth.yango_lima_driver_state_snapshot)
    │
    ▼
PROGRAM ELIGIBILITY (yego_lima_program_eligibility_service.py)
    │
    ▼
OPPORTUNITY LISTS (growth.yango_lima_daily_opportunity_list)
    │
    ▼
ACTION TRACKING (control loop: actions, impact, attribution)
```

### Plan Data Flow

```
PLAN UPLOAD (Excel/CSV)
    │
    ▼
PLAN PARSER (plan_parser_service.py, control_loop_upload_service.py)
    │
    ▼
PLAN TABLES (ops.plan_trips_monthly, ops.plan_versions_metadata)
    │
    ▼
CONTROL LOOP RESOLVE (control_loop_business_slice_resolve.py)
    │
    ▼
PLAN PROJECTION VIEWS (ops.v_plan_projection_control_loop)
    │
    ▼
PROJECTION SERVING (serving.omniview_projection_daily_fact)
    │
    ▼
API (/ops/business-slice/omniview-projection)
```

---

## 6. TABLE DEPENDENCIES (CORE)

### 6.1 Reads by Domain

**Omniview Matrix (business_slice):**
- `ops.real_business_slice_day_fact` (daily)
- `ops.real_business_slice_week_fact` (weekly)
- `ops.v_real_business_slice_month_serving` → `ops.real_business_slice_month_fact` / `ops.real_business_slice_month_snapshot` (monthly)
- `ops.v_business_slice_coverage_month` (coverage)
- `ops.v_business_slice_unmatched_trips` (unmatched)
- `ops.v_business_slice_mapping_coverage` (coverage)

**Real LOB:**
- `ops.mv_real_lob_day_v2` (daily)
- `ops.mv_real_lob_week_v3` (weekly)
- `ops.mv_real_lob_month_v3` (monthly)
- `ops.mv_real_lob_hour_v2` (hourly, source for chain)
- `ops.real_rollup_day_fact` (daily rollup)
- `ops.real_drill_dim_fact` (drill detail)

**Plan vs Real:**
- `ops.mv_plan_vs_real_monthly_fact_canonical` (canonical)
- `ops.mv_plan_vs_real_monthly_fact` (legacy)
- `ops.v_plan_trips_monthly_latest` (plan)
- `ops.mv_real_monthly_canonical_hist` (real canonical)

**Projection:**
- `serving.omniview_projection_daily_fact` (projection serving)
- `ops.v_plan_projection_control_loop` (plan projection)
- `ops.v_real_business_slice_month_serving` (real for projection)

**Driver Lifecycle:**
- `ops.mv_driver_lifecycle_base` (base lifecycle)
- `ops.mv_driver_weekly_stats` (weekly)
- `ops.mv_driver_monthly_stats` (monthly)

**Lima Growth:**
- `growth.yango_lima_driver_history_daily` (driver history)
- `growth.yango_lima_driver_360_daily` (360 view)
- `growth.yango_lima_driver_state_snapshot` (state)
- `growth.yango_lima_daily_opportunity_list` (opportunities)
- `growth.*` (multiple growth schema tables)

**Yango Loyalty:**
- `ops.mv_yango_loyalty_performance_monthly_v1` (loyalty)

**Freshness / Governance:**
- `ops.data_freshness_expectations` (expectations)
- `ops.data_freshness_audit` (audit log)
- `ops.serving_registry` (serving registry)
- `ops.refresh_run_log` (refresh log)
- `ops.observability_artifact_registry` (artifacts)
- `ops.period_closure_registry` (period closure)

### 6.2 Writes (Critical)

| Table | Writer | Risk |
|-------|--------|------|
| `ops.real_business_slice_{day,week,month}_fact` | `business_slice_incremental_load.py`, `business_slice_real_refresh_job.py` | HIGH — canonical fact tables |
| `ops.real_business_slice_month_snapshot` | `period_closure_service.py` | HIGH — snapshot for locked periods |
| `serving.omniview_projection_daily_fact` | `refresh_omniview_projection_facts.py` | HIGH — DELETE+INSERT |
| `ops.mv_driver_lifecycle_base` | `refresh_driver_lifecycle.py` | HIGH — DROP+CASCADE (non-idempotent) |
| `growth.*` (lima growth) | Multiple refresh/services | MEDIUM |
| `ops.action_engine_output` | `action_engine_service.py` | LOW — prototype |

## 7. DEPENDENCY GRAPH (SERVICE LEVEL)

```
business_slice_service.py
    ├── business_slice_omniview_service.py
    ├── business_slice_real_freshness_service.py
    ├── business_slice_canonical_service.py
    ├── projection_expected_progress_service.py
    │       └── seasonality_curve_engine.py
    ├── omniview_freshness_governance_service.py
    └── business_slice_incremental_load.py (write path)

real_lob_service_v2.py
    ├── real_lob_daily_service.py
    ├── real_lob_drill_pro_service.py
    ├── real_lob_v2_data_service.py
    ├── real_lob_filters_service.py

serving_governance_service.py
    ├── serving_guardrails.py
    ├── serving_refresh_scheduler.py
    └── serving_operability_service.py

period_closure_service.py
    ├── period_state_engine.py
    ├── last_good_data_service.py
    └── period_semantics_service.py

yego_lima_* (growth machine - 50+ service files)
    ├── yego_lima_driver_360_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_driver_state_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_program_eligibility_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_daily_opportunity_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_control_loop_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_queue_operational_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_segment_migration_service.py
    ├── yego_lima_impact_attribution_service.py
    └── ... (40+ more)

yango_loyalty_service.py
    ├── yango_loyalty_performance_service.py
    ├── yango_loyalty_definition_service.py
    └── yango_loyalty_reachability_service.py
```

| RealLOBView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Real LOB | `/ops/real-lob/*` |
| RealLOBDrillView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Real LOB Drill | `/ops/real-lob/drill/*` |
| PlanVsRealView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Plan vs Real | `/ops/plan-vs-real/*` |
| MonthlyView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | LEGACY Monthly | `/core/summary/monthly` |
| MonthlySplitView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | LEGACY Split | `/ops/{real,plan}/monthly` |
| GlobalFreshnessBanner.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Freshness | `/ops/data-freshness/global` |
| LimaGrowthDashboardV2.jsx | frontend/src/pages/ | Growth Machine V2 | Multiple `/yego-lima-growth/*` |
| LimaGrowthDashboard.jsx | frontend/src/pages/ | Growth Machine | Multiple `/yego-lima-growth/*` |
| YegoProProfitabilityPage.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Yego Pro | `/yego-pro/*` |
| DriverLifecycleView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Driver Lifecycle | `/driver-lifecycle/*` |
| SupplyView.jsx | frontend/src/components/ | Supply | `/ops/supply/*` |

| Prefix | Count | Domain |
|--------|-------|--------|
| `/ops/business-slice/*` | ~15 | Omniview Matrix |
| `/ops/real-lob/*` | ~20 | Real LOB |
| `/ops/plan-vs-real/*` | ~5 | Plan vs Real |
| `/ops/data-freshness/*` | ~5 | Data Freshness |
| `/ops/action-engine/*` | ~10 | Action Engine (diagnostic) |
| `/ops/omniview-v2/*` | ~15 | Omniview V2 |
| `/plan/*` | ~10 | Plan Management |
| `/yego-lima-growth/*` | ~100+ | Growth Machine |
| `/yango-loyalty/*` | ~10 | Yango Loyalty |
| `/yego-pro/*` | ~5 | Yego Pro |
| `/driver-lifecycle/*` | ~15 | Driver Lifecycle |
| `/phase2b/*` | ~10 | Phase 2B (legacy) |
| `/phase2c/*` | ~10 | Phase 2C (legacy) |
| `/ingestion/*` | ~3 | Ingestion status |
| `/health` | 1 | System health |
| `/api/ops/serving/health` | 1 | Serving health (raw) |

## 10. LEGACY VS CANONICAL (STATUS)

**Canonical (ACTIVE, preferred):**
- Omniview Matrix (Business Slice)
- Omniview V2 (source-agnostic)
- Real LOB v2/v3
- Plan vs Real canonical (`mv_plan_vs_real_monthly_fact_canonical`)
- Lima Growth V2

**Legacy (still serving, migration planned):**
- MonthlyView.jsx → migrate to Omniview
- MonthlySplitView.jsx → migrate to Omniview
- Real LOB v1 endpoints → migrate to v2
- `core_service.py` → migrate to business_slice_service
- `plan_real_split_service.py` → migrate
- `mv_real_trips_by_lob_month/week` (v1 MVs) → migrate to v2/v3
- Supply MVs (`mv_supply_weekly`, `mv_supply_monthly`) — STALE, pipeline gap

**Deprecated (blocked/superseded):**
- `BusinessSliceOmniviewProjectionTable.jsx`
- `BusinessSliceOmniviewProjectionCell.jsx`
- `refresh_omniview_real_slice.py` (blocked by safety guard)
- `backfill_week_from_day_fact.py` (blocked by safety guard)
- `backfill_real_lob_mvs.py`
